Ahumgar is a term used to refer to the protective sense of self identity which [[Sapients]] and likely [[Transapients]] have. 

It is derived from a phoenetic respelling of the Sanskrit word Ahamkara.

[[Gnosis]] and [[Ego Death]] result in the temporary total dissolution of the Ahumgar, and [[larping]] results in the partial dissolution of the Ahumgar.

The Ahumgar causes people to become afraid of any change, positive or negative. It causes [[Existential Entrapment]]

It is unclear whether the Ahumgar is a necessary feature of [[sapients]] or [[Transapients]], but it seems to be impossible to permanently remove the Ahumgar from [[humans]]
[[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Ahumgar]][[sn:Ahumgar]][[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Ahumgar]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
